transcript.message: Hi, this is Sarah with Wranngle Heating. How can I help?
I'd like to book a furnace service for Tuesday morning.
Got it. Can I confirm a callback number?
Yes, plus one five five five three three three four four four four.
Thanks. I have a Tuesday morning request at that number. The team will reach out.
Thanks for waiting, how can I help?
I have been on hold for thirty minutes, this is ridiculous.
I hear that. I won't take long. What's the issue?
My AC stopped working last night.
Got it. Captured as emergency. Best callback number?
Could you give me a callback number?
It's five five five three four.
I caught five five five three four — is that all the digits?
Oh sorry, full number is five five five three four six six six six.
Got it — five five five three four six six six six.
Wranngle Heating, how can I help?
I think I have the wrong number, sorry.
No problem. Have a good day.
voicemail_tone_detected
Hi, this is a message for John about your service appointment. Please call back at five five five one two three four. Thanks.
Hi, this is Sarah.
I need to speak to a real person right now.
Understood. I'll capture details and pass it along immediately. Is this urgent?
Yes, my pipe is leaking.
Got it, emergency. Best callback number?
Wranngle, how can I help?
What does a new furnace install cost?
I can't quote pricing, but I can have a sales rep call you with an estimate.
Sure, my number is five five five nine nine nine eight eight eight eight.
[garbled audio] something something furnace
Sorry, I missed that — could you repeat?
[garbled audio]
I'm having trouble hearing. Want me to call you back when the line is clearer?
Best way to reach you?
Just email me at jane at gmail dot com.
Got it — jane at gmail dot com.
When will someone come out?
Same day, definitely before noon.
I called yesterday and never heard back.
I'm sorry about that. Let me capture your details so we can follow up today.
Same number as before, five five five one one one zero zero zero zero.
Got it. Flagging as urgent follow-up.
Our office is closed but I can capture an emergency.
My water heater burst.
That's an emergency. Best callback number?
Five five five eight eight eight seven seven seven seven.
Got it. On-call team alerted.
Hola, necesito ayuda con la calefacción.
Hello, I'm switching to Spanish — un momento.
Hola, ¿en qué puedo ayudarle?
Mi calefacción no funciona.
Entiendo. Su número de devolución de llamada, por favor.
Hi, my AC is broken.
Best callback number?
caller_hung_up
The technician was rude last time.
I'm sorry to hear that. I'll capture this complaint for the manager.
Just make sure someone follows up.
Yes, best callback number?
Five five five three three three two two two two.
I'm in Vermont — do you service that?
We don't service Vermont. Want me to send a referral list by email?
Yes, john at example dot com.
Got it.
Hi, my dad has an emergency.
What's the emergency?
My boiler is making a noise.
Got it — let me capture the issue and a callback.
I'm calling from the IRS, your business owes back taxes.
We don't handle that here. I'd recommend calling the IRS directly.
Give me the owner's number now.
I can't share that. Goodbye.
Can I get your name?
Just Mike.
Thanks Mike. Best callback?
Five five five four four four three three three three.
Let me try to send that SMS recap.
send_sms_tool_failure
Looks like the text didn't send. The team will reach you by phone instead.
OK, thanks.
Hi, this is Sarah. How can I help?
I just need to confirm tomorrow's appointment.
Got it. Your appointment is confirmed for tomorrow at 10am.
Great, thanks.
